item.title: Notifications + alerts + self-repair + digest
item.intent: Proactively alert users to agent health issues and auto-recover from common failures. Users should not discover their agent died by noticing silence.
item.description: DAY-2 OPS: Users who've had an agent for 30+ days need to know it's healthy without checking manually. Predictive health alerts catch problems before they become failures. Auto-recovery handles the common cases (container stopped, OOM) without user intervention. Daily digest gives the 'what did my agent do today?' answer proactively. Acceptance: health alerts fire before service goes down; auto-recovery handles restart + OOM cases; daily digest delivered via configured channel.
steps: Add predictive health alerts based on resource trends
Implement auto-recovery for container stopped and OOM cases
Build daily digest delivery via configured channel
acceptanceCriteria: Health alerts fire before service goes down
Auto-recovery handles container restart and OOM cases
Daily digest delivered via configured notification channel
